Amethyst Club

ing Meeting

pages.raw_text:
Mrs. William O. Smith and Mrs.
William Nicholson, with Mrs. }. g.
Long and Mrs. Ross Bratttin az
alternates, were elected az dele
gates to the state federation Of
woman's clubs, at Walla Walla from
October 11-13. from the Amethyst
club at meeting held yesterday at
the home Of Mrs. William G. Smith,
Eb1117 Browne street.


A prettiiy appointed luncheon
preceded the business meeting yes
terday, after which the roll call was
responded to by quotations from
James Whitcomb Riley.


An interesting paper on Homo
lulu" was given by Mrs. ]. ]. King
and Mrs. G. ]. Wilcox ably dis
cussed Middle West Literary Writ
f-ers."


= In the absence OF Mrs. Buckley.
Mrs. J. r. Mitchell recited Little
Boy Blue" A book review Of
"Hoosier School Masters was given
by Mrs. William Nicholson. A dis.
cussion on United States history,
1.-THE Period Of Discovery" was led
by Mrs. G. e. Burkett.


The next meeting will be held In
two weeks at the home Of Mrs. g. G.
Mantell, 1104 Eighth avenue.
